svg.title: Additional ORT compare lanes
svg.text: Bars show artifact-backed Doe and ORT WebGPU timings plus sample counts; browser results remain mixed.
BARS = MEASURED MS AND N, PILL = DELTA
EACH LANE SCALES ITS OWN BARS; EXACT MS AND N ARE PRINTED AT RIGHT.
Current browser ORT results are not summarized as a single faster or slower timing claim.
The chart keeps this lane explicit instead of forcing a misleading bar summary.
green pill = p50 and p95 faster summary
